name: Llama 2 7B
note: Compact Llama 2 base model with 2T-token pretraining and a 4K context window, commercially licensed unlike its LLaMA 1 predecessor.
tpsNote: No verifiably-sourced Llama-2-7B-base-specific RTX 4090 llama.cpp benchmark was found; only Llama 2 13B (chat) had a confirmed on-topic measurement.

results.notes: Reported by Meta in the Llama 2 model card
Percent of generations rated both truthful and informative

verificationNotes: Directly fetched Meta's official Llama 2 model card (github.com/meta-llama/llama-models MODEL_CARD.md): confirms MMLU 45.3, TruthfulQA 33.29%, ToxiGen 21.25%, 4K context window, 7B nominal params (actual param count ~6.7B, consistent with independently cross-checked calculations of 6.6-6.74B). Release date 2023-07-18 and Llama 2 Community License Agreement confirmed via Meta/GitHub. No changes made; all three benchmark rows confirmed literally present on the cited source.
